prerequisites: An active Ubidots account on industrial.ubidots.com (or your dedicated Ubidots instance) with access to the API Credentials section.
A Ubidots API token, since API calls accept only the token and not the master API key.
The token must have permission to read the devices, variables, and values you intend to extract.

authMethods.name: API token (X-Auth-Token)
authMethods.summary: Provide the api_token secret field. Ubidots authenticates each API request with this token, sent in the X-Auth-Token request header. Only a token works for API calls; the account's master API key cannot be used directly to authenticate requests.

setupSteps.title: Sign in to Ubidots and open API Credentials
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Ubidots account, click the account drop-down button, and select 'API Credentials' (also reachable via My Profile, then API Credentials in the left panel).

setupSteps.title: Copy or create a token
setupSteps.body: In the API Credentials section you will see your API key (the master key) and your tokens. Copy an existing token or create a new one. Use the token, not the API key, since the API only accepts tokens.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the token in the required api_token field. The connector sends it in the X-Auth-Token header to authenticate every request to the Ubidots API.

sources.title: Ubidots Help Center - Find your token credentials
